name: Golden Cauliflower
subtitle: Turmeric-stained probiotic florets
blrNote: Cauliflower can sometimes be "gassy." Add a pinch of hing (asafoetida) to the brine to help.
tldr: Cauliflower florets + turmeric + brine. Becomes a bright yellow, crunchy, tangy snack.

steps.title: Jar
steps.instruction: Pack into a jar. Add turmeric to the brine and pour over.

steps.title: Wait
steps.instruction: 5–7 days. The cauliflower will absorb the yellow color.

culturalContext.story: A variation of "Giardiniera" (Italian pickled vegetables) but with a South Asian spice profile.
culturalContext.funFact: Turmeric is also an antimicrobial, which helps keep the ferment "clean."
